summary: Iteration 32: VISUAL REBRAND VERIFICATION - All SPET branding confirmed, no SPETAP text found anywhere. All functional flows verified working. Theme toggle, logout, and all page navigations work correctly.

spet_branding.login_page: ✅ SPET branding correct - 'Venue Operations Platform' tagline
spet_branding.tap_page: ✅ TAP header shows DISCO badge, no SPETAP

visual_rebrand_verification.spetap_check: NO 'SPETAP' TEXT FOUND ON ANY PAGE - rebrand complete
visual_rebrand_verification.dark_theme: ✅ Premium dark-first aesthetic with proper contrast
visual_rebrand_verification.backdrop_blur_headers: ✅ All headers have bg-card/80 backdrop-blur-md glass effect

venue_home.details: Calendar renders, 'Hugel' event shows with Active badge, double-click enters Pulse

pulse_entry.details: 7 guests visible, NFC scan input works, Manual Entry button present

pulse_bar.details: Bar tab navigation works, bartender selector, Inside Tabs (5) visible

tap_page.details: 5 open tabs with amounts (Sofia $42, Lucas $34, Maria $44, Ricardo $127, Fernando VIP $352), category buttons work

table_page.details: 8 tables grid, 3 occupied (T2-Maria Santos, T3-Ricardo Almeida, T7-Fernando VIP), statuses display correctly

kitchen_kds.details: 14 pending tickets, Kanban columns (Pending/Preparing/Ready/Delivered/Delayed) display, Kitchen/Bar filter buttons work

manager_dashboard.details: All sidebar items present (Overview, Staff & Roles, Tables by Server, Menu/Products, Shifts & Ops, Shift vs Ops, NFC & Guests, Reports & Finance, Loyalty & Rewards, Settings), KPIs display ($70 Revenue, 5 Open Tabs, etc), Top 10 Items renders

owner_dashboard.details: All sidebar items present (Overview, Performance, AI Insights, Finance & Risk, Growth & Loyalty, People & Ops, System), dashboard content loads with venue data

theme_toggle.details: Light/dark toggle works on all pages, background changes from dark to rgb(249, 250, 251)

logout.details: Logout button works from header, redirects to /login

screenshots: 02_venue_home.png - VenueHome with calendar and Hugel event

seed_data_verification.staff_barmen: Multiple servers visible (Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32: VISUAL REBRAND FULLY VERIFIED. All pages show 'SPET' branding (not 'SPETAP'). Premium dark-first theme with electric blue accent (#3b82f6) applied correctly. All backdrop-blur glass headers present. Functional flows: Login→VenueHome→Pulse(double-click event)→TAP→Table→Kitchen→Manager→Owner all working. Theme toggle switches between dark/light modes. Logout redirects to login page. No functional regressions detected from visual-only changes.
